docs.title: Hynobius Documentation
docs.text: Hynobius is a C++ chess engine chess engine with tutorials, documents, scientifc testing and web analysis interface.

docs.title: Sections
docs.text: • Project Overview

docs.title: Design Goal
docs.text:
Hynobius is an engine for people to understand how an engine actually works. Thus, there are several goals this project would like to achieve:

  • Use easy and readable codes to implement. (So NO complecated bitboard and bit tricks)
  • Write detailed comments.
  • Write tutorals/ documents to store basic knowledge to build an engine.
  • Write git_usage/ documents to understand how git works and why it is important.
  • Write optimization/ documents to store how can an engine improve itself by scientific tests. (such as A/B tests)

docs.title: Current Documents Label
docs.text: Documents Content engine/ Store main architectures, function designs. (TODO) github_usage/ Store github utils and usage. img/ Store images. optimization/ Store testing usage and means to improve an engine. tutorials/ Store basic knowledge.

docs.title: Search
docs.text:
• Alpha-beta prunting with iterative deepeing.
  • Move ordering (PV move, TT move, killer moves).
  • Transportation table (TT).
  • Aspiration window.
  • Late move reduction (LMR).
  • Quietscene search with check evasions.

docs.title: Evaluation
docs.text:
• Material scores.
  • Basic Piece-square tables (PST).

docs.title: Scientific Testing
docs.text:
• Automatic AB testing with Cute Chess and GitHub actions.
  • Elo tracking.
  • Self-hosted runner.

docs.title: Web Analysis
docs.text:
• WASM-compiled engine running is browser.
  • Interface board and PGN analysis.

docs.title: UCI
docs.text: (todo)

docs.title: CLI
docs.text: (todo)

docs.title: Performance
docs.text:
• Go see and play with HynobiusChess BOT right here.
  • ~1700 elo on bliz (based on Lichess elo).

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text:
• Improve time management.
  • Improve move ordering and search speed.

docs.title: Piece
docs.text:
• Check a piece is white or black.
  • Check whether two pieces share the same color.
  • Transform functions between Piece and char.

docs.title: Board
docs.text:
• 8x8 board array.
  • every pieces' positions (piecePos[][]).
  • every pieces' count on the board (pieceCnt[]).
  • material score.
  • PST score.
  • side to play (player).
  • castling rights.
  • zobrist key for the current board.

docs.title: Attack
docs.text:
• check a square is either attacked or not.
  • count attacks in a square.

docs.title: Evaluate
docs.text:
• class Evaluate to evaluate the current board.
  • castle rights evaluation.
  • center control evaluation.
  • king safety evaluation.
  • material points.
  • mobility.
  • pawn structure evaluation.
  • PST.
  • SEE.
  • tempo.

docs.title: Generates
docs.text:
• generate pseudo-legal positions, including pieces, pawns and castling.
  • generate pseudo-legal moves, including pieces, pawns and castling.
  • generate pseudo-legal capture moves especially for quietscene search.

docs.title: Make Move
docs.text:
• makeCastleMove, undoCastleMove especitally for castles.
  • makeMove, undoMove.

docs.title: Search
docs.text:
• findBestMove, the start of the search progress.
  • searchRootCore is separated for aspiration window.
  • negamax, the main search progress.
  • quietscence will process in a leaf node to avoid horizen effect.

docs.title: UCI play Flow
docs.text:
graph TD

%% ===== Input Layer =====
subgraph Input
    start["User Command"]
end

%% ===== UCI Layer =====
subgraph UCI Layer
    uci["UCI Module"]
    uci_parser["UCI Move Parser"]
end

%% ===== Engine Layer =====
subgraph Engine Core
    engine["Engine"]
    search["Search"]
end

%% ===== Flow =====
start -->|send command| uci

uci -->|position / startpos / fen| uci_parser
uci_parser -->|parsed moves| uci

uci -->|go command| engine

engine -->|start search| search
search -->|best move / score| engine
engine -->|response| uci

docs.title: Make Move Flow
docs.text:
1. record current castle rights, material points, PST, and zobrist key.
  2. update castle rights.
  3. update board pieces.
  4. update material score.
  5. update PST.
  6. update zobrist key.
  7. update piecePos.

docs.title: Undo Move Flow
docs.text:
1. recover castle rights, material points, PST, and zobrist key.
  2. recover board pieces.
  3. recover piecePos.

docs.title: 修正重點
docs.text:
• 將 const 變數修為 UPPER_SNAKE_CASE。
  • 新增位置與玩家變數檢查。

docs.title: 問題發現
docs.text:
• countSquareAttacks 中尚未寫未寫王的攻擊者計算，會顯著影響引擎精度。已修正。
  • getAttackers 中尚未寫未寫王的攻擊者查詢，對引擎精度可能有影響。已註解提示。

docs.title: 修正重點
docs.text:
• 移除不須使用的變數、函式、重複功能的函式。
  • 將其他檔案有關於 board 的函式修正。

docs.title: 問題發現
docs.text:
• isInBoard 不應放在 Board 裡面，嚴重影響程式邏輯。已修正。
  • isInBoard 與 isPositionValid 功能重複，刪除 isPositionValid。
  • 棋力與 PST 已是公開變數，不須做 update get。

docs.title: 修正重點
docs.text:
• 更新簡易函數為 inline。
  • 修正其餘檔案中有關於 Piece 修正的錯誤。

docs.title: 問題發現
docs.text:
• Check.cpp 中每次都需每次O(64) 掃一遍棋盤，建議用陣列紀錄棋子位置。
  • Piece.cpp 應該包含由 Player 加上棋子轉成 Piece 的函式，但其放在 Pgn_Transformer 並使用 map 降速。已更改。
  • 常用並簡潔的函式應使用 inline 清楚語意。
  • enum 應使用 class，並加上 sstatic_cast<>() 清楚語意且增加安全性。

docs.title: 修正重點
docs.text:
• 將 enum Player 改為 enum class Player。
  • 將簡易函式化為 inline 使用。

docs.title: 問題發現
docs.text: • enum class Player 所置之位置奇怪，之後應整合 enum。

docs.title: 修正重點
docs.text: • 增加對於 Player 合法性與 Piece 合法性檢查

docs.title: Self Code Review
docs.text:
Code Review 可以確保程式碼品質，也就是可讀性、可維護姓、格式的一次檢查，對於團隊可以塑造團隊文化，也是資深工程師協助初階工程師的好時機。(根據 E+如何做好 Code Review? 如何寫出更快通過 Code Review 的程式碼?)

當然，只有自己一個人也可以做 Code Review，而重點會放在程式碼品質上。

docs.title: 變數命名
docs.text: 使用時機 命名法 說明 一般變數與函式 lowerPascalCase 單字組合時第一單字小寫，其餘單字開頭大寫 class、enum、structure PascalCase 單字組合開頭大寫 常數 (const) UPPER_SNAKE_CASE 單字組合所有字皆大寫，用 _ 分隔。

docs.title: 註解要求
docs.text:
• 若程式碼長到無法一眼看出功能，則須寫上註解。
  • 若發現錯誤或警告，以 ERROR WARN 表示，如此之後即可 CTRL-F 搜尋。

docs.title: engine improvement
docs.text:
日期 初始局面深度 6 所需時間 精度 Negamax 節點數 QuietScence 節點數 功能改動 2026/2/3 之前 \(\approx 2 s\) \(50 /100\) \(\approx 70000\) \(\approx 50000\) \(\alpha \beta\ Search\)+QuietScence 2026/2/3 \(\approx 5 s\) \(70/100\) \(125636\) \(108325\) 加入 Mobility 2026/2/5 初始局面 \(1560ms\) 未測量 \(39917\) \(31046\) 加入 TT 2026/2/10 初始局面 \(3350ms\)，中盤 \(10s\) 未測量 \(428791\) \(417649\) 還原成正確版 \(\text{Negamax}\) 2026/2/10 初始局面 \(3350ms\)，中盤 \(10s\) 未測量 \(471392\) \(414627\) 加入 \(\text{Delta Pruning}\) 2026/2/10 初始局面 \(527ms\)，中盤 \(2s\) 未測量 \(51745\) \(41488\) 加入 \(\text{LMR}\) 2026/2/15 初始局面 \(851ms\)，中盤 \(5s\) 未測量 \(70665\) \(55754\) 加入 \(\text{aspiration window}\)，並在 QS 內使用完整分析

從 2026/2/18 開始，統一以 position startpos moves d2d4 g8f6 c1f4 d7d6 e2e3 c8g4 g1f3 b8c6 b1d2 此位置為準，與 go depth 6 來測量以下數據。

日期 總節點數 QS節點數 耗時 每秒節點數 備註 2026/2/18 \(191563\) \(101219\) \(1244ms\) \(153989\) 加入 \(\text{Killer move}\) 紀錄，並以相同中盤為基準測量。

From 4/11, engine improvement is measured using A/B test. Please see [TODO] to check engine strength.

docs.title: Opening
docs.text: Thanks to this github repo, the project can use almost every reasonable openings to decrease bias.

docs.title: Perft
docs.text: python ./tests/perft/Perft_Test.py --engine build/Hynobius.exe --file tests/perft/Perft_Tests.txt --max-depth 4

docs.title: mate-in-one-test
docs.text:
首先感謝 Bhupen 在此網頁提供的一步將殺資料。

請注意，目前 1n2r3/1bnp2p1/r1Q4p/p3b2k/PP3p1P/2NB1K2/R2N1PP1/7R w - - 1 40 這筆資料可能判成 g2g4，因為尚未實作en passant
